# Security Policy

## Supported versions

Flect is a static site template rather than a versioned, installed package. Security fixes are applied to the latest version on the `main` branch — if you've forked or copied the template, pull in the latest changes to stay current.

## Reporting a vulnerability

**Do not open a public issue for security vulnerabilities.**

Report privately via GitHub: [Security advisories](https://github.com/shravanngoswamii/flect/security/advisories/new)

Please include:

- A description of the vulnerability and its impact
- Steps to reproduce or a proof-of-concept
- Any suggested fix, if you have one

If the issue is confirmed, a fix will be released as soon as possible and you will be credited in the release notes unless you prefer otherwise.
